name: AR Aging Agent
tagline: Instant AR aging analysis and customer balance intelligence for Business Central
description: Delivers instant accounts receivable aging analysis directly from Business Central—surfacing overdue balances, customer payment trends, and collection priorities so finance teams can act on the highest-risk accounts first.

reviews.author: Finance Director, Aptean Customer
reviews.comment: Cuts our monthly AR review from half a day to under 10 minutes.

reviews.author: Controller, Food Manufacturer
reviews.comment: Finally a way to get aging out of BC without exporting to Excel.
